2603.20670.title: Towards Intelligent Geospatial Data Discovery: a knowledge graph-driven multi-agent framework powered by large language models
2603.20670.paper_summary: The rapid growth in the volume, variety, and velocity of geospatial data has created data ecosystems that are highly distributed, heterogeneous, and semantically inconsistent. Existing data catalogs, portals, and infrastructures still rely largely on keyword-based search with limited semantic support, which often fails to capture user intent and leads to weak retrieval performance. To address these challenges, this study proposes a knowledge graph-driven multi-agent framework for intelligent geospatial data discovery, powered by large language models. The framework introduces a unified geospatial metadata ontology as a semantic mediation layer to align heterogeneous metadata standards across platforms and constructs a geospatial metadata knowledge graph to explicitly model datasets and their multidimensional relationships. Building on the structured representation, the framework adopts a multi-agent collaborative architecture to perform intent parsing, knowledge graph retrieval, and answer synthesis, forming an interpretable and closed-loop discovery process from user queries to results. Results from representative use cases and performance evaluation show that the framework substantially improves intent matching accuracy, ranking quality, recall, and discovery transparency compared with traditional systems. This study advances geospatial data discovery toward a more semantic, intent-aware, and intelligent paradigm, providing a practical foundation for next-generation intelligent and autonomous spatial data infrastructures and contributing to the broader vision of Autonomous GIS.
2603.20670.paper_summary_zh: 地理空間數據的量、種類和速度的快速增長創造了高度分散、異質且語義不一致的數據生態系統。現有的數據目錄、門戶和基礎設施仍然主要依賴基於關鍵字的搜索，語義支持有限，這往往無法捕捉用戶意圖，導致檢索性能較弱。為了解決這些挑戰，本研究提出了一個基於知識圖譜的多代理框架，用於智能地理空間數據發現，並由大型語言模型驅動。該框架引入了一個統一的地理空間元數據本體作為語義中介層，以對齊跨平台的異質元數據標準，並構建一個地理空間元數據知識圖譜，以明確建模數據集及其多維關係。在結構化表示的基礎上，該框架採用多代理協作架構來執行意圖解析、知識圖譜檢索和答案合成，形成一個可解釋的閉環發現過程，從用戶查詢到結果。來自代表性用例和性能評估的結果顯示，與傳統系統相比，該框架顯著提高了意圖匹配準確性、排名質量、召回率和發現透明度。本研究推進了地理空間數據發現，朝著更具語義、意圖感知和智能的範式邁進，為下一代智能和自主空間數據基礎設施提供了實用基礎，並為自主GIS的更廣泛願景做出貢獻。
2603.20670.author: Ruixiang Liu et.al.
2603.20670.authors: Ruixiang Liu, Zhenlong Li, Ali Khosravi Kazazi
